Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class SubjectModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
public class SubjectModel extends Object
SubjectModel provides CRUD and search operations for SubjectBean, interacting with the st_subject table via JDBC.

This class throws project-specific exceptions (ApplicationException, DatabaseException, DuplicateRecordException) to indicate failure conditions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Shruti Rathore

    • SubjectModel

      public SubjectModel()

  • Method Details

    • nextPk

      public Integer nextPk() throws DatabaseException
      Returns next primary key value for st_subject table.
      Returns:
      next primary key (Integer)
      Throws:
      DatabaseException - if a database access error occurs

    • add

      public long add(SubjectBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Adds a new subject record into database.
      Parameters:
      bean - SubjectBean containing subject data to add
      Returns:
      primary key of newly inserted subject
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any SQL exception occurs while adding subject
      DuplicateRecordException - if a subject with same name already exists

    • update

      public void update(SubjectBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Updates an existing subject record.
      Parameters:
      bean - SubjectBean containing updated values (must include id)
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a SQL error occurs while updating
      DuplicateRecordException

    • delete

      public void delete(SubjectBean bean) throws ApplicationException
      Deletes a subject record from database.
      Parameters:
      bean - SubjectBean containing id of subject to delete
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a SQL error occurs during delete

    • findByPk

      public SubjectBean findByPk(long pk) throws ApplicationException
      Finds a subject by primary key.
      Parameters:
      pk - primary key of subject
      Returns:
      SubjectBean if found, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a SQL error occurs while fetching data

    • findByName

      public SubjectBean findByName(String name) throws ApplicationException
      Finds a subject by name.
      Parameters:
      name - subject name to find
      Returns:
      SubjectBean if found, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a SQL error occurs while fetching data

    • list

      public List<SubjectBean> list() throws ApplicationException
      Returns all subjects.
      Returns:
      List of SubjectBean
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a SQL error occurs during retrieval

    • search

      public List<SubjectBean> search(SubjectBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Searches subjects based on provided filter bean and supports pagination.
      Parameters:
      bean - SubjectBean filter (null means no filter)
      pageNo - page number (1-based). If pageSize > 0, pageNo is used to compute offset.
      pageSize - number of records per page. If 0, returns all matching rows.
      Returns:
      List of SubjectBean matching criteria
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a SQL error occurs during search
